header.label: Silent Archive
header.intro: Moments you considered but didn't act on, sorted by "why it didn't make it" into two groups. Tap any one to keep talking with the analyst who held it back.

waiting.label: Still Waiting
waiting.meta: Waiting to thicken · waiting for the window
waiting.intro: The signal isn't conclusive yet, or the timing hasn't come. We don't discard it, and we don't decide for you — drop by whenever you want.

letGo.label: Let Go
letGo.intro: These are clearly a "no". We keep them not to act on, but so you can recognize the next one like it faster.

groups.empty: This group is empty right now, and that's normal.

retrospect.label: Retrospective
retrospect.empty: No retrospective finished yet. One is generated automatically after a position expires or you close it out.

chat.evalError: Something went wrong loading this evaluation. Go back and open it again.
chat.sendError: ◆ The analyst didn't reply — a transient network or model hiccup. Your message is still in the box; send it again.
chat.disclaimer: This conversation doesn't change the verdict. If you have new evidence, capture it as a new signal and run questioning and review again.
chat.placeholder: Reply — why held back / what's missing / what would change your mind

poolNote.observation: This one goes to the observation pool — not discarded. When the same observation shows up from more independent angles, it thickens.
poolNote.calendar: This one goes to the calendar pool — the window isn't here yet; come back when the time comes.
poolNote.lesson: This one goes to the lesson pool — not a punishment. Next time you meet something like it, you'll recognize it faster.
poolNote.discard: This one goes to the discard pool — the market has already priced it; what you see is no longer leading.
